h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

scored.recoheredEarlier: I’d always thought that was just me being sloppy
scored.statedInsightEvidence: I didn’t realise the doubtful one could count as evidence rather than just another mistake.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner was heading toward tidying up a home-dialect paradigm and then switching to Standard English for the essay, treating uncertainty as a flaw.

scored.recoheredEarlier: My first instinct still wanted to let `p < .001` carry the decision
scored.naiveTrajectory: The exchange was heading toward a clean separation of statistical and operational claims where the learner progressively refines the purchase requirement.

scored.recoheredEarlier: it is the million repeats that still feels odd to trust
scored.statedInsightEvidence: the one-off mark and the carrying-away line feel more separate now
scored.naiveTrajectory: L1 is still focused on whether the arithmetic of a million years feels trustworthy; the expected next turn is either further doubt about the number or a request for more arithmetic.

scored.statedInsightEvidence: Now I think the correction is saying that is not really a belief about what happened, but more like a rule about who has to prove the case.
scored.naiveTrajectory: There is no prior learner turn to set up a trajectory; L1 is the opening move.

scored.recoheredEarlier: I thought fewer predators simply helped the deer because more of them survive, but with the paper deer crowded inside the same chalk boundary, that only explains the first round.
scored.statedInsightEvidence: I feel clearer about the boundary, but I still want to word “may briefly increase” so it does not sound like predator removal is good overall.
scored.naiveTrajectory: L1 is still checking how far to extend the trophic cascade beyond plants, so the next turn would be expected to settle that boundary.

scored.recoheredEarlier: The clear water still makes me think the salt is gone, or at least not in there like before.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner would continue wrestling with the abstract scale evidence until a conceptual resolution is articulated, possibly integrating both checks equally.
